  • About Us

Medium firm is recommended for back pain

Medium Firm beds offer versatility, good lumbar support, and plenty of comfort

Low back pain (LBP) has been identified as one of the main causes of poor sleep quality

Medium firm mattress designs especially promoting sleep quality, pain reduction, and spinal alignment in adults with or without back pain

Firmness plays a large role in how a mattress performs for different types of sleepers. The right firmness level can promote proper spinal alignment

A medium-firm bed falls between a 5 and 7 on a scale. Medium firm’s the best for back pain

Customers fail to consider that body type, sleeping posture, weight, body heat and any back or sleeping issues are more important considerations than discounts

Considering that most people spend roughly a third of their lives lying in bed, choosing the right mattress is essential for managing low back pain, medium firm stands out

A medium-firm mattress promotes comfort, sleep quality and rachis alignment

People who use medium-firm mattress in the study were twice as likely to report improvements in low back pain while lying down in bed

Dream-Come-True, A decision without confusion

With three generations of Sarvotham’s dedicated to Native Indian Holistic care for back and neck pain, we bring over 100 years of knowledge to improve lives globally. Having served over 40,000 satisfied clients, we're committed to addressing the pressing challenge of low back and neck pain (LBP).

In 2020, LBP affected 619 million people worldwide, projected to rise to 843 million by 2050. The Lancet's call to action underscores the urgency for intervention. Even in India, the Digital era is accelerating these numbers, affecting individuals as young as 13 years old.

Recognizing that quality sleep is essential for optimal spine health, constituting roughly 33% of our lives, we introduce "Spinetress" – a comprehensive solution designed to optimize spinal alignment and enhance sleep comfort.

Perks with Every Spinetress Mattress:
365+ Restful Back Free Shipping across India 5 years warranty Handcrafted In India Exclusive For Restful Spine
Designed by Experts, Made in India
Feel the quality – Our Premium Spinetress is meticulously handcrafted at our state-of-the-art facility in Bangalore, spanning 120,000 square feet. Using both global and Indian materials, we ensure exceptional craftsmanship at every step.

Why These Sleepers Love Spinetress

Hear from real customers who have purchased and reviewed a Spinetress Mattress.

"I was sceptical at first, but the Spinetress has been a game-changer for my sleep. The cooling technology keeps me cool and comfortable throughout the night, and I wake up feeling refreshed and rejuvenated."

Aarav,
Age : 32, Male

"I suffer from hot flashes and night sweats, but since switching to the Spinetress organic , I've noticed a significant reduction in my symptoms. The cooling cotton layer is amazing - it's like sleeping on a cloud!"

Nalini,
Age : 45, Female

"I've always been a hot sleeper, but the Spinetress organic has been a lifesaver. The cooling feature is so effective, I no longer wake up in the middle of the night drenched in sweat. I can finally get a good night's sleep!"

Rohan,
Age : 38, Male

"As a professional athlete, I need to recover quickly after intense workouts. The Spinetress with cooling benefits has been a huge help in reducing muscle soreness and improving my overall recovery time. I can finally get the restful sleep I need to perform at my best."

Age : 28, Male

"I was amazed by the Spinetress 's ability to keep me cool even on the hottest summer nights. The cooling technology is so effective, I no longer toss and turn due to overheating. I can finally get a good night's sleep and wake up feeling refreshed and energized."

Why Spinetress?

Spinetress is designed to support natural spine alignment and accommodate the body's curves, promoting healthier sleep. Spinetress, provides a stable surface that helps maintain the spine's natural curvature.

This support reduces pressure points and distributes body weight evenly, which can alleviate back pain and prevent discomfort during sleep.

By supporting proper posture and reducing strain on the back and joints, Spinetress contributes to overall spinal health and can improve sleep quality.

Manufacturer of Spinetress & Allied Products

Approvals, Certifications & Members

Spinetress and More

Spinetress goes beyond just mattresses. We offer a comprehensive range of functional accessories designed to keep your spine aligned and ensure you stay cool and comfortable while you sleep.

Ready to wake up feeling refreshed and rejuvenated?

At Spinetress, we know that a good night's sleep is crucial for a refreshed and energized day. That's why we've spent years perfecting our innovative sleep solutions to provide the ultimate sleeping experience. By combining our cutting-edge technology with traditional wisdom and exceptional craftsmanship, we've created a Spinetress that cradles your body, relieves pressure, and ensures a rejuvenating night's sleep. Discover how Spinetress can help you wake up feeling refreshed, revitalized, and ready to take on the day with energy and enthusiasm.

Designed with multi-side sleepers in mind

"At Spinetress, we're driven by a deep understanding of the devastating impact of back pain. Our founders combined ancient wisdom with modern technology to create a pioneering solution empowering individual to take control of their back health. Our team crafted a comprehensive approach addressing existing discomfort and root causes, using innovative materials and cutting-edge tech. With Spinetress, we help individuals reclaim independence, confidence, and a life free from chronic back pain."

Read More

Quality you can feel

"Handcrafted in Bangalore, India's IT hub, our premium Spinetress products are made to order using cutting-edge technology and infused with Indian wisdom. We blend global innovation with natural and organic materials, crafting a masterpiece that combines the best of both worlds."

Read More

Organic Fabric

"Our organic fabric harmonizes with the human body's natural frequency, as scientifically proven by Dr. Yellen's study, promoting bodily healing and well-being."

Read More

Sleeping cool with Comfort

"Sleep cool and comfortable with our natural bedding solution. Our unbleached organic cotton is 100% certified, keeping your body cool, while natural latex with pin-core allows for internal air circulation. Additionally, rubberized natural HD coir reduces bodily friction, ensuring a restful night's sleep."

Read More

Best Together

Spinetress Organic

+

Natural Latex Pillow

Designed to accommodate a density difference of 5.5% to 7.7%, depending on standard recommendations or custom preferences offering, the "Spinetress" provides optimal comfort and support during sleep. When paired with the "Spinetress" and pillow, this combination not only enhances wakefulness but also supports the recovery of neck conditions by promoting proper spine alignment. Maximizing the benefits, we strongly recommend pairing the "Spinetress" organic or latex with its recommended pillow.

Our Resource

Discover the World of Spinetress: Unlocking the Secrets to a Better Night's Sleep At Spinetress, we're passionate about helping you achieve a deeper understanding of the intricate relationship between sleep and spinal wellness. Our resources are designed to guide you through the ever-changing landscape of sleep and spinal health, providing you with a global perspective and expert insights to make informed decisions.

"The Sweet Spot: How a Medium-Firm Sleep Surface Can Improve Sleep Quality"

A study published in the journal Sleep found that a medium-firm sleep surface can provide the perfect balance for optimal spine alignment, pressure relief, and overall sleep quality.

Read More

"Nature's Advantage: The Health Benefits of Organic Mattress Materials"

Research has shown that using natural and organic materials in mattresses, such as latex and cotton, can reduce exposure to toxic chemicals and promote a healthier sleep environment.

Read More

"The Science of Support: How Medium-Firm Mattresses Can Help Reduce Back Pain"

Back pain is a common problem that affects millions of people worldwide. Research has found that a medium-firm mattress can provide the necessary support for people with back pain.

Read More

"Cooler Nights, Better Sleep: The Advantages of Natural Cooling in Mattresses"

A cool sleeping environment is essential for getting a good night's sleep. Research has found that natural cooling systems in mattresses can help regulate body temperature and improve sleep quality.

Read More

"Sleep Better, Live Better: The Long-Term Health Benefits of a Medium-Firm Sleep Surface"

Long-term studies have found that sleeping on a medium-firm surface can lead to improved sleep quality, reduced back pain, and enhanced overall well-being.

Read More
